officialSources.name: Next.js official docs
officialSources.purpose: Conceptual docs for App Router, Server Components, Client Components, data fetching, caching, revalidation, routing, API routes, Server Actions, configuration, and deployment.

officialSources.name: Next.js framework repository
officialSources.purpose: Versioned samples and implementation references for latest major behavior.

awesomeSourceDetails: Indexed from unicodeveloper/awesome-nextjs (master) and officialrajdeepsingh/awesome-nextjs (main). 45 boilerplate repos analyzed for patterns.

externalSkillPacks.react-best-practices: Use vercel-react-best-practices skill for React performance patterns (waterfalls, bundle size, re-renders).
externalSkillPacks.composition-patterns: Use vercel-composition-patterns skill for React component architecture patterns.

policy: Prefer official Next.js docs and versioned framework samples. Use awesome lists and boilerplate repos for ecosystem discovery and patterns; do not let low-signal community snippets override official guidance. Refresh sources/inventory.json before publishing or using the skill for a new major Next.js version.
